name: Peanut Butter Bonbons
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the peanut butter and margarine until smooth.
2. Stir in the powdered sugar and cereal. Blend together with hands.
3. Form into 1/2-inch balls.
4. Chill until firm.
5. Meanwhile, to prepare the coating:
- In a double boiler over low heat, melt the chocolate bar and disks.
- Set the double boiler in hot water to maintain consistency.
- Melt the butterscotch chips.
6. Dip half of the candies into the milk chocolate mixture and the other half into the butterscotch mixture.
7. Place on waxed-paper-lined baking sheet.
8. Chill until the chocolate and butterscotch are firm.
